title: Tranfection of SpCas9 containing plasmids to generate cell lines with Cas9
author: Binnypreet Kaur1

steps_raw.instruction: We electropoarted Spcas9 containing plasmid (pVY015) with Leishmania mexicana UTR under hygromycinselection marker as described in Protocol 7.
